case_title: DELMAR TANCHEZ VS. STEVE TEIJEIRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANCHEZ, DELMAR AS TO DEFENDANT TEIJEIRO, STEVE EXPERT PAINTING AND DRYWALL INC., A CA CORP.
